priorities.label: S98 P1 - Fix E2E CI lane: split @quarantine-flaky into its own non-gating job + tag S62 so gating `e2e` greens and the flaky real-WebRTC suite can never cancel/red the run (stops the GitHub failure emails).
priorities.objective: Gating `e2e` job goes reliably GREEN and the flaky real-WebRTC suite can never cancel or red the workflow run -> no more failure emails.
priorities.scope: (.github/workflows/e2e.yml) Move quarantine step into its OWN job e2e-quarantine with continue-on-error:true at JOB level (the real email-stopper), own timeout-minutes, no `needs` (e2e job self-contained: Playwright webServer runs npm run dev; separate runners=no port clash), distinct artifact upload, --reporter=list --output=test-results-quarantine. Gating job e2e runs only --grep-invert '@quarantine-flaky' at timeout 15, name UNCHANGED (preserve required-check). Tag S62 (e2e/smoke.spec.ts:666 describe) with ' @quarantine-flaky' + comment. Optional e2e:gating/e2e:quarantine npm scripts. Verify required-check name = job e2e via gh api. OUT: needs:[e2e] on deploy.yml; de-flaking WebRTC-in-CI (carry-forward; quarantine LOCKED policy).
priorities.testing: actionlint/YAML sanity; npm run e2e:gating/:quarantine --list resolve right sets; tsc 0 + vitest unchanged; PUSH + gh run view: e2e job GREEN, e2e-quarantine runs independently and its failure neither emails nor gates (D3 boot-then-smoke).

priorities.label: S98 P2 - Combo order-symmetry Option B: mirror the 8 one-way magic pairs (same magic both orders), keep Triangle<->Circle (Wheel/Star) directional, HUD stays N/14, empirical rebalance.
priorities.objective: Connecting the same two shape types yields the same magic regardless of carry order for the 8 one-way pairs; Wheel/Star duality preserved; HUD N/14; persistence + discovery count intact; balance held via measured (not assumed) win-score.
priorities.scope: (src/combos.ts) ADD 8 reverse rows to MAGICAL[] reusing the byte-identical ComboOutcome of each forward row (Dot<->Line/Square/Spiral, Line<->Triangle/Circle/Spiral, Triangle<->Spiral, Square<->Circle); leave comboKey() UNSORTED (no key-format change -> no save/replay/localStorage migration); keep Triangle->Circle & Circle->Triangle distinct. TABLE.size stays 36 (magic 14->22, functional fill 22->14). Discovery canonicalized by resultName (detectComboDiscoveries) -> forward+reverse unlock same tile, +1 not +2; codex catalog dedupes by resultName so N/14 stays 14 tiles (D2: MAGIC_COMBO_KEYS may grow 14->22 - ensure catalog/count use distinct resultName). REBALANCE EMPIRICAL: Vitest scoring-delta sim of canonical/representative build under original vs symmetric table (D1: locate canonical build; else documented representative); scale PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE + SCORE_TIER_STEP in lockstep (keep /3) by measured factor only if material (>~3%). Rewrite (not delete) the 4 asymmetry-invariant tests -> symmetric for the 8 + Wheel!=Star. Amend LOCKED_DECISIONS sec6 + combos.ts header + Blueprint secV.1 (covered by user approval). Grep tutorial/tooltip for 'order matters'.
priorities.testing: tsc 0; full vitest green incl rewritten invariants + new tests (8 symmetric, reverse=same tile +1, old-save load=expected); scoring-delta sim recorded; TABLE.size===36 + /3 invariant green; build+bundle guard; live: codex shows 14 tiles, reverse-order placement reveals same tile.

priorities.label: S98 P3 - Connection Preview: while dragging a primitive from spawn, render a pulsating faded preview of EXACTLY the bond(s) it will form (distance + connector count) before release; on release the real bond commits at full opacity in player+shape color.
priorities.objective: Player sees, before releasing, a pulsating faded preview of exactly the connection(s) the dragged primitive will form at the current position (connect distance + number of connectors); on release the real bond commits (existing code) at full opacity in player+shape color. Local-only, render-only, zero netcode/sim change.
priorities.scope: Extract ONE pure computePotentialBonds(world,targetRefPos,draggedType,playerId)->{primary,mergeBonds[],redundancyBonds[]} from onUp's assembly (controls.ts:519-532, using pure pickers pickHostTargetPrimitive/collectHostMergeCandidates/pickRedundantBondTargets); BOTH onUp AND a new DragPreviewRenderer call it -> preview==release structural. Per-frame while controls.state==='AttractDrag': refPos = isClient?cursor:spark.pos (exact onUp expr, controls.ts:456); evaluate computeReleaseGates (pure) -> no phantom bonds when rejected; draw all 3 bond classes via drawBondVisual with visualEffectId=lookupCombo(draggedType,targetType), colorA=colorB=world.players.get(localPlayerId).color (placerColor NOT ownerColor), pulse=clamp01(BASE+AMP*sin(performance.now()/1000*HZ*2pi)) named constants HZ<=1.0 base~0.4, g.clear() each frame, moveTo before arcs. Own Graphics on app.stage ABOVE structureRenderer layers BELOW aboveFogLayer (NOT in aboveFogLayer -> fog.spec contract). S53 previewGraphics = lifecycle/destroy reference only. Joiner = best-effort (host re-derives; pre-existing netcode). OUT: any sim/netcode/balance change.
priorities.testing: Pure unit tests on computePotentialBonds (same fn guards drift); gate-rejection -> empty; tsc 0 + vitest green incl fog.spec; live preview-tools: drag near 0/1/2/3 targets, preview lines match committed bonds, color+pulse correct, nothing renders over spawn-zone/enemy-territory/beyond reach; frame-time sane (D4-ok).
